description: Style NoteThis impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with chinos or denims and style it with understated accessories.Product DetailsGrey and yellow striped shirt that has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest with a secret internal pocket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash dark colours separatelyHand wash or machine wash coldUse mild detergentFlat dry in shadeDo not wring, bleach, iron on printSize and FitEdgy fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
